General.Name: Icetana Ltd
General.Description: icetana Limited provides video analytics solutions in the Asia Pacific, North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The company engages in the development and commercialization of icetana Solution, an AI-assisted video surveillance software using machine learning to provide automated real-time anomalous event detection. It also offers icetana AI safety and security software, icetana AI licence plate recognition (LPR) software, icetana AI facial recognition software, icetana AI analytics software, icetana AI forensic surveillance software, and icetana AI triage agent. The company serves prisons, healthcare, and guarding industries. icetana Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 152 St Georges Terrace, Perth, WA, Australia, 6000
